block.name: NeuroGraph GUI 2.0 — Phase 2: Ecosystem Dashboard Tab
block.scope: NeuroGraph — add Dashboard tab to neurograph_gui.py with 5 auto-refreshing ecosystem panels
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard tab renders with 5 LabelFrame panels: Syl/NeuroGraph, TID Routing, Bunyan Narrative, Elmer Health, THC Repairs
python3 -m py_compile neurograph_work/neurograph_gui.py passes with exit code 0
Changes committed and pushed to NeuroGraph repo

outputs.name: neurograph_gui.py
outputs.contract: Dashboard tab added; EcosystemPoller class present; 5 panels wired; py_compile passes

never: Do not modify any vendored file: ng_lite.py, ng_peer_bridge.py, ng_tract_bridge.py, ng_ecosystem.py, openclaw_adapter.py, ng_autonomic.py, ng_embed.py
Do not instantiate NeuroGraphMemory or any module class directly — HTTP endpoints or file reads only (Law 1)
Do not touch data/checkpoints/ or any msgpack file
anti_drift: All new classes go inside neurograph_gui.py, not in new files
EcosystemPoller uses threading.Thread with daemon=True for each panel fetch
In-flight guard per panel: skip spawn if _in_flight[panel] is True
All panel fetches degrade gracefully with offline:True dict on any error

params.command: python3 -c "import os; t=os.environ.get('GITHUB_TOKEN',''); print('TOKEN_OK' if t else 'TOKEN_MISSING')"

steps.description: Remove stale partial clone from any previous run
Clone NeuroGraph repo (includes Phase 1 changes from BLK-GUI-197)
Insert EcosystemPoller class before the IngestionManager section separator
Initialize self.ecosystem_poller in NeuroGraphGUI.__init__ before file_watcher

params.old_text:
self.file_watcher: Optional[FileWatcher] = None
        self._ingest_history: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
params.new_text:
self.ecosystem_poller = EcosystemPoller(
            on_panel_ready=lambda panel, data: self.msg_queue.put(
                self._apply_dashboard_panel, panel, data
            ),
        )
        self.file_watcher: Optional[FileWatcher] = None
        self._ingest_history: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []

steps.description: Add all Dashboard tab methods to NeuroGraphGUI before Settings Dialog section
Verify neurograph_gui.py has no syntax errors
Commit Phase 2 changes and push to NeuroGraph main

params.command: git -C neurograph_work config user.email "codemine@et-systems.ai" && git -C neurograph_work config user.name "Codemine" && git -C neurograph_work add neurograph_gui.py && git -C neurograph_work diff --cached --quiet && echo ALREADY_COMMITTED || (git -C neurograph_work commit -m "feat: GUI 2.0 Phase 2 — Ecosystem Dashboard tab (BLK-GUI-198)" && git -C neurograph_work push origin HEAD && echo PUSH_OK)
